name: Til the Snow Melts
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Base DMG +[StateArg1]%. At the start of the battle, the wielder gains 25 stacks of "Snow". Playing a card grants 2 Aliemus and removes 1 stack. Once all "Snow" stacks are removed, the wielder gains [StateArg2]% Crit. Rate.
lore:
She stood atop the peak, raising the black spike in her hand.

In the raging blizzard, she faced the mountain of madness—and the fate that had abandoned, betrayed, and crushed her.

She would win in the end;
the snow would melt, and she would return in a new form.

That was what she had said.

Elworth is a land of extreme cold, where the snow never recedes.

This is common knowledge.

Just as no warrior, however strong, could challenge a transcendent being, just as no man could overcome their own fate.

And yet, the snow on that mountain melted anyway. Didn't it?
